name: Dabur India Limited
summary: Dabur India Limited is an Indian consumer goods company that manufactures and markets a wide range of ayurvedic and natural health care products, personal care products, and food products. The company's portfolio includes brands such as Dabur Chyawanprash, Dabur Honey, and Vatika. Dabur India is headquartered in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India.
